content:
# elizaos/eliza Daily Update (Jun 2, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
Development on June 2, 2026, focused on stabilizing the Eliza Cloud infrastructure, optimizing desktop startup performance, and refining the multi-agent orchestrator. Key achievements include enabling the agent web UI by default, implementing background model warmup for desktop, and resolving critical routing and billing issues in the cloud API.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS

*   **Cloud Infrastructure & API Enhancements**
    *   Enabled the per-agent web UI by default (`ELIZA_UI_ENABLE=true`) to improve sandbox interaction ([#8167](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8167)).
    *   Isolated Steward tenant for staging redirects and pinned the tenant ID via headers ([#8176](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8176), [#8179](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8179)).
    *   Implemented service-key provisioning and patron chat support ([#8150](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8150)).
    *   Fixed billing logic to guarantee token budgets for reasoning models ([#8189](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8189)).

*   **Desktop Performance & Startup Optimization**
    *   Introduced deferred model warmup (embedding pre-boot, voice post-ready) to eliminate first-use stalls ([#8151](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8151)).
    *   Implemented "tray-first" startup and decoupled UI spawning for faster app initialization ([#8148](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8148)).
    *   Resolved bootstrap issues for fresh clones, ensuring private workspace packages are built during post-install ([#8168](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8168), [#8146](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8146)).

*   **Orchestrator & Core Logic Refinements**
    *   Closed TOCTOU race conditions in completion-deduplication to prevent duplicate replies ([#8161](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8161)).
    *   Improved message routing to prioritize coding work requests over web search when terms overlap ([#8160](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8160)).
    *   Suppressed leaked task-spawn JSON envelopes from user-facing replies ([#8159](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8159)).
    *   Refactored local inference by removing ~919 lines of dead voice subsystem code ([#8154](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8154)).

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
A high volume of activity occurred, including:
*   **Orchestrator & UI:** [#8180](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8180), [#8178](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8178), [#8166](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8166), [#8158](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8158), [#8182](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8182), [#8181](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8181), [#8171](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8171).
*   **Cloud & Agent Fixes:** [#8174](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8174), [#8157](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8157), [#8152](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8152), [#8149](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8149), [#8190](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8190).
*   **Desktop & App:** [#8192](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8192), [#8175](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8175), [#8184](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8184), [#8186](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8186).
*   **Maintenance & Misc:** [#8191](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8191), [#8187](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8187), [#8185](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8185), [#8183](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8183), [#8172](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8172), [#8170](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8170), [#8153](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/pull/8153).

## CLOSED ISSUES

*   **Cloud & Inference Stability:** Resolved issues regarding mixed KMS/health failures, nightly local-inference profiling, and web-fetch routing regressions ([#8062](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8062), [#8063](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8063), [#8122](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8122)).
*   **Orchestrator & Runtime Fixes:** Addressed output wrapping leaks, desktop-ffi prewarm crashes, and build-intent mis-routing ([#7970](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7970), [#7991](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/7991), [#8051](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8051), [#8127](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8127)).
*   **Documentation & Setup:** Fixed broken community plugin registry links and unblocked fresh-clone builds ([#8173](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8173), [#8143](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8143)).

## NEW ISSUES

*   **Orchestrator UX & Logic:** Concerns regarding sub-agent completion narration dropping deliverables and requests for a richer chat workbench ([#8162](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8162), [#8188](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8188)).
*   **CI & UI Dependencies:** Issues with `@elizaos/logger` resolution in tests and Storybook rendering for components importing `@elizaos/core` ([#8164](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8164), [#8177](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8177)).

## ACTIVE ISSUES

*   **[#8162](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8162) Orchestrator: sub-agent completion narration drops/garbles deliverable:**
    *   Extensive discussion regarding "live-info" queries being misrouted to coding sub-agents.
    *   NubsCarson provided detailed analysis on why current routing causes data mangling and proposed a router-internal recovery design for `session_state_lost` errors to replace planner-driven respawn loops.
*   **[#8142](https://github.com/elizaos/eliza/issues/8142) app-core dist/entry.js externalizes un-hoisted transitive deps:**
    *   Clarified that the issue stems from consumer-side bundling (e.g., Milady's tsdown config) rather than upstream `app-core` itself.
    *   Discussed potential fixes including declaring `bundleDependencies` or adjusting consumer-side external policies.
